# PoraPop

PoraPop is a Sri Lankan-inspired collectibles brand creating playful keytags, stickers, mini gifts, and tiny keepsakes for travellers, island lovers, and gift buyers.

Website: https://porapop.lk
Instagram: https://instagram.com/porapoplk
TikTok: https://tiktok.com/@porapop.lk

## Brand description

PoraPop creates small, playful, culturally inspired collectible pieces with a warm, colourful, island-inspired personality.

## Current status

PoraPop is launching soon. Visitors can join the early access list to receive first drop updates.

## Key pages

- Home / Coming Soon: https://porapop.lk/

## Contact / Updates

Follow PoraPop on Instagram and TikTok for launch updates and sneak peeks.
